_meta.purpose: Agentic image generation prompts for K-Aqua product catalogue. Compatible with Google Imagen 3 / Antigravity 2.0, Midjourney v7, DALL-E 3, Stable Diffusion XL.

brand_style.primary_color: PP-R green — #3AAA35 to #48B244, matte-satin plastic surface
brand_style.accent_color_brass: Golden-yellow brass — CW617N, warm metallic sheen
brand_style.background: Pure white #FFFFFF or very light studio grey #F5F5F5
brand_style.lighting: Soft studio diffuse, slight top-left key light, clean shadow beneath object
brand_style.camera: Slight 3/4 isometric perspective, product centered, no tilt distortion
brand_style.render_quality: Photorealistic 3D render, product-catalogue quality, no watermarks, no text overlays

_meta.global_negative_prompt: text, labels, watermark, logo, person, hands, background objects, blurry, low quality, distorted proportions, rust, damage, dirt, web page UI, screenshot, table rows, navigation bar

output_format.aspect_ratio: 1:1 for single products, 16:9 for hero/group shots

prompts.prompt: Professional product photography of a single PP-R pipe end cap fitting. The cap is made of smooth matte-satin green polypropylene plastic (#3AAA35), dome-shaped closed end with a cylindrical socket opening at the bottom for pipe insertion. The socket rim has a slight chamfer. Slight 3/4 isometric view, top-left studio lighting, pure white background, soft shadow beneath the object. Photorealistic 3D render, product-catalogue quality, no text, no labels.
prompts.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, person, rust, damage, dirt, web UI, screenshot, background objects
prompts.size_reference: d=20–75 mm range — show a medium size (d=32 mm) as representative

prompts.prompt: Professional product photography of seven PP-R pipe end caps arranged in a diagonal line from small to large, sizes 20 mm to 75 mm. All caps are smooth matte-satin green polypropylene (#3AAA35), dome-shaped with cylindrical socket openings. They are arranged on a pure white surface in ascending size order from left to right, slight 3/4 isometric overhead view. Soft studio diffuse lighting, clean drop shadows beneath each cap. Photorealistic 3D render, product-catalogue quality, no text.
prompts.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, person, rust, damage, dirt, web UI, screenshot
